Marazul Resort  ·  Cancún

Rooms &
Suites.

Waterfront accommodations designed around the view — lagoon breezes, Caribbean light, and everything you need to feel at home on the water.

Inquire & Book ← Back to Resort

Accommodations

Sleep closer
to the water.

Every room at Marazul is positioned to make the most of the Cancún landscape — lagoon views, sea breezes, and the sound of water just outside your door.

Standard

Lagoon Room

Comfortable, well-appointed rooms with private balcony overlooking the lagoon. King or twin beds, AC, flat screen, and direct access to resort amenities.

  • Private balcony · Lagoon view
  • King or twin beds
  • Air conditioning · Smart TV
  • Resort pool & amenity access
Inquire about this room →
Suite

Ocean Suite

Spacious suites with separate living area, premium furnishings, and panoramic views of the Caribbean. Ideal for couples seeking a luxury getaway.

  • Panoramic ocean & lagoon view
  • Separate living area · King bed
  • Jacuzzi · Premium bath amenities
  • Personalized service
Inquire about this suite →
Premium

Marina View Room

Wake up to boats on the water. These rooms overlook the marina directly — ideal for boat owners or anyone who lives for the sea.

  • Direct marina views
  • Private terrace · King bed
  • Air conditioning · Smart TV
  • Priority marina access
Inquire about this room →
